summary: Completed testing of iteration 27 - All 6 features verified and working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features tested and verified working in iteration 27. Dashboard tabs only appear for regular members (role='member' or 'user'), not for admins. The Simulate View feature shows member data but doesn't change the role check for tabs.

dashboard_tabs_for_members.details: Regular members see 4 tabs (Overview, Profit, Trades, Charts) on dashboard. Admins do NOT see tabs. Tested with member account jaspersalvador9413@gmail.com. All tabs are clickable and show different content: Overview shows Performance Overview and Your Stats, Profit shows Profit Summary and Performance Metrics, Trades shows Trade History, Charts shows Profit Trend and Projected vs Actual charts.

api_key_security_modal.details: Master Admin sees 'Missing API Keys' warning modal on login when API keys (Heartbeat, Emailit, Cloudinary) are missing. Modal shows list of missing integrations with descriptions. Has 'Remind Me Later' and 'Configure Now' buttons.

persistent_footer.details: Footer appears at bottom of all pages with copyright text and custom links. Footer shows: '© 2024 CrossCurrent Finance Center. All rights reserved.' and links for Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Contact. Made with Emergent badge also visible. Footer Settings section in Admin Settings > Links tab allows customization.

login_customization.details: Login page shows customizable title ('Welcome to CrossCurrent'), tagline ('Your Trading Finance Hub'), and notice ('Only CrossCurrent community members can access this platform.'). Admin Settings > UI tab has Login Page Customization section with Login Title, Login Tagline, and Login Notice Message fields with live preview.

production_site_url.details: Admin Settings > Branding tab has 'Production Site URL' field. Currently set to 'https://app.crosscurrent.com'. Description says 'All test/preview links will be replaced with this URL in emails and exports'. Field saves and returns correctly via API.

crosscurrent_text_not_heartbeat.details: Login page says 'Welcome to CrossCurrent' not 'Heartbeat'. All community references say CrossCurrent. Sidebar shows 'CrossCurrent Finance Center'. Footer shows 'CrossCurrent Finance Center'.

api_tests.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Master admin and member login works
api_tests.GET /api/settings/platform: PASS - Returns all settings including new fields (login_title, login_tagline, login_notice, production_site_url, footer_copyright, footer_links)
api_tests.PUT /api/settings/platform: PASS - Updates settings with new fields
api_tests.GET /api/profit/summary: PASS - Returns profit summary for dashboard

ui_tests.login_page: PASS - Shows CrossCurrent branding, customizable title/tagline/notice
ui_tests.dashboard_admin_view: PASS - Admin does NOT see tabs, sees Performance Overview and Your Stats
ui_tests.dashboard_member_view: PASS - Member sees 4 tabs (Overview, Profit, Trades, Charts)
ui_tests.admin_settings_seo_tab: PASS - Shows Site Title, Site Description, OG Image URL
ui_tests.admin_settings_branding_tab: PASS - Shows Platform Name, Tagline, Logo, Favicon, Production Site URL, Hide Emergent Badge toggle
ui_tests.admin_settings_ui_tab: PASS - Shows Login Page Customization (Login Title, Login Tagline, Login Notice) and Color Scheme
ui_tests.admin_settings_links_tab: PASS - Shows Registration Link and Footer Settings (Copyright Text, Footer Links)
ui_tests.footer: PASS - Visible on all pages with copyright and custom links
